arts.ttl: Jim Goodwin wary of Celtic threat as Dundee Utd warned ahead of Parkhead clash
arts.sum: In conversation ahead of Celtic’s clash against Dundee United, Goodwin made it clear that his side need to be wary as the Bhoys have the capacity to ‘cut’ teams open at the drop of a hat. Matchday is here and Celtic have the chance to move 16 points clear at the Scottish Premiership summit should they topple Dundee United this evening.

arts.ttl: The reported £10k-a-week gap that divides Greg Taylor and Kieran Tierney
arts.sum: As Greg Taylor's contract negotiations drag on, so too do rumblings of a Kieran Tierney return to Celtic Park - here's the £10k figure that divides them

arts.ttl: 'How'... Tony Watt can't believe Rangers didn't try and sign £1m Celtic player
arts.sum: But it was a player Celtic signed last summer who Tony Watt can’t believe Rangers didn’t attempt to sign despite the low fee it cost Rodgers to nab him on transfer deadline day. Luke McCowan was Celtic’s last signing of the summer transfer window after Brendan Rodgers shelled out £1m to land the former Dundee captain.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers earns sarcastic Celtic applause as ego driven dressing down takes Hotline heat off Clement
arts.sum: Craig Swan took your calls as Rangers boss slammed for yet more excuses and told to follow Tony Soprano's advice

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI vs Dundee Utd as Brendan Rodgers looks to extend Bhoys' Premiership lead
arts.sum: Your predicted starting XI is as follows: Schmeichel, Johnston, Carter-Vickers, Trusty, Taylor, McGregor, Engels, Hatate, Kuhn, Maeda, Kyogo. Celtic are back in action tonight against Dundee United, and Brendan Rodgers will be champing at the bit for his side to extend their Scottish Premiership lead over Rangers to 16 points.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd in Celtic fan barb as Green Brigade warned not to 'upset' Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: Hoops fans incurred the wrath of Rodgers in the wake of Sunday's 3-0 win over St Mirren

arts.ttl: Former Rangers man shares scary reality for Celtic's foes and they can blame Glasgow Derby defeat for it
arts.sum: And it seems that things for the rest of the SPFL are going to get worse when they come up against Celtic after the defeat to Rangers claims former Ibrox midfielder, Ian Murray. It was suggested to Murray that the 14-point gap at the top of the table was the main reason Celtic were off it at Ibrox but the ex-Rangers midfielder refuted that but did send a warning to the rest of the SPFL as he gave his old club credit for the win.

arts.ttl: What Kieran Tierney to Celtic transfer will cost as Greg Taylor wage demands 'revealed'
arts.sum: The future of one left-back and the arrival of another is the hot topic of discussion surrounding the Hoops

arts.ttl: James McFadden states what has happened at Celtic post-RB Leipzig after Rodgers' 'unusual' actions
arts.sum: Following Rodgers’ comments and talk about the style of play, James McFadden highlighted that match and explained how it’s ‘very difficult’ to reach those levels again because he seemingly suggested that’s what fans now expect, as he told the Warm Up. Celtic opened the scoring just after the half-hour mark, but before that, the fans inside Parkhead were getting frustrated at the team for not moving the ball forward quickly enough.

arts.ttl: Celtic learn Bazoumana Toure transfer fee as Hammarby warn circling suitors they'll have to break records
arts.sum: The Hoops have scouted the 18-year-old who has also been linked with a switch to the English Premier League
